name: BiDictionaryOneToOne<TFirst, TSecond>
summary: This is a dictionary guaranteed to have only one of each value and key. It may be searched either by TFirst or by TSecond, giving a unique answer because it is 1 to 1.

methods.name: TryAdd(TFirst, TSecond)
methods.summary: Tries to add the pair to the dictionary. Returns false if either element is already in the dictionary

returns.doc: true if successfully added, false if either element are already in the dictionary

methods.name: TryGetByFirst(TFirst, ref TSecond)
methods.signature: bool TryGetByFirst(TFirst first, ref TSecond second)
methods.summary: Find the TSecond corresponding to the TFirst first. Returns false if first is not in the dictionary.

returns.doc: true if first is in the dictionary, false otherwise

methods.name: TryGetBySecond(TSecond, ref TFirst)
methods.signature: bool TryGetBySecond(TSecond second, ref TFirst first)
methods.summary: Find the TFirst corresponding to the TSecond second. Returns false if second is not in the dictionary.

returns.doc: true if second is in the dictionary, false otherwise

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: The number of pairs stored in the dictionary
